probleme.subtitle: Every hour spent on repetitive tasks is a sales hour lost. AI doesn't sleep, doesn't complain, and doesn't make mistakes.

items.description: Hours, availability, pricing, process — your team spends 40% of the time on recurring questions. That's billed time you're not collecting.
Find, enrich, contact, follow up. A manual cycle that exhausts and does not scale.
You receive contacts. But who is really ready to buy? Without AI qualification, it's wasted time.

items.titre: You manage. You don't sell anymore.
items.description: Billing, client follow-up, reminders, reporting — you've become a project manager, not a salesperson. Meanwhile, your competitors are closing deals.

howItWorks.title: Operational in
howItWorks.subtitle: From signature to first qualified lead — in two days.

steps.description: We analyse your current workflows, tools and friction points. In 24h, we define exactly what AI will automate for you.
We install and configure your AI agents: vocal receptionist, prospecting sequences, Meta campaigns. Everything connected to your existing tools.
Your clients receive qualified leads, answered calls, active campaigns. You collect the monthly recurring subscription — effortlessly.

features.subtitle: 6 AI modules deployed and configured in 48h. Each module adapts to your sector and existing workflows.

items.description: Your vocal agent answers calls, qualifies prospects, schedules appointments and transfers only hot leads to your team.
Multi-step email and SMS sequences, personalised by AI. Automatic contact enrichment and smart follow-ups.
Automatic creation, optimisation and scaling of your Meta campaigns. AI adjusts budgets, audiences and creatives in real time.
Your AI agents communicate in the prospect's language. Perfect for Belgian agencies operating in Flanders, Wallonia and Brussels.
Centralised dashboard with real-time KPIs: calls handled, qualified leads, conversion rate, revenue generated per client.
n8n, Airtable, Make, Zapier, HubSpot, Twilio, Calendly and more. Your existing workflows integrate seamlessly in a few clicks.

roi.subtitle: Choose your sector and estimate your monthly gains with Airia.
benefits: Zero hours spent on manual prospecting
Leads automatically qualified before your team
Calls handled even outside office hours

testimonials.subtitle: 12 Belgian agencies. Measurable results from the first weeks.
testimonials.ctaText: Join the 12 agencies already automating with Airia

items.texte: The AI receptionist answers 80% of inbound calls. My team only handles genuinely hot leads. We gained 3h per day and signed 4 new mandates in one month.
In 2 weeks, our AI email prospecting sequence generated 23 qualified appointments. Before, we had 3-4 per month with a dedicated team. The ROI was immediate.
Meta campaigns run on their own. AI adjusts budgets in real time based on performance. +340% leads in 3 months for 3 clients. They all renewed.

seo.title: AI Receptionist for Belgian Real Estate Agencies | Airia
seo.description: Airia automates vocal reception, prospecting and Meta campaigns for Belgian real estate agencies. Deployed in 48h. €500–1000/month.
seo.ogTitle: AI Receptionist for Belgian Real Estate Agencies | Airia
seo.ogDescription: Automate your real estate agency with a 24/7 AI receptionist. Lead generation, Meta campaigns. Deployed in 48h in Belgium.

demo.footerTexte: Install this AI in your business?

voix.label: Call the {{secteur}} AI directly from your browser

accueil.immobilier: Hello! I'm the AI receptionist of your real estate agency. Are you looking to buy, sell or rent a property? I can qualify your project and schedule an appointment.
accueil.dentaire: Hello! I'm the AI assistant of the dental practice. What type of care are you looking for? I can check your availability and book an appointment.
accueil.avocat: Hello! I'm the AI secretary of the law firm. What is the nature of your request — civil, criminal or commercial? I'll assess the urgency and suggest a time slot.
accueil.notaire: Hello! I'm the AI assistant of the notary office. Real estate deed, inheritance or marriage contract? I'll guide you and schedule your appointment.
accueil.plombier: Hello! I'm the AI receptionist of the plumber. Leak, breakdown or installation? I qualify the urgency and schedule the intervention.
accueil.electricien: Hello! I'm the AI receptionist of the electrician. Breakdown, installation or compliance? Describe the situation and I'll schedule the intervention.
accueil.comptable: Hello! I'm the AI assistant of the accounting firm. VAT, annual accounts or company creation? I qualify your need and schedule a consultation.
accueil.web-agency: Hello! I'm the AI receptionist of the web agency. Website, app or SEO project? Tell me about your project and I'll schedule a discovery call.
